channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ebola testing improves in DRC but remains insufficient
item.description: The DRC has boosted Ebola testing capacity with two facilities near the epicenter, but this may still be inadequate to contain the outbreak.

item.title: White House hantavirus and Ebola response contrasts with COVID criticisms
item.description: The administration imposed mandatory quarantines for two cruise passengers with hantavirus and is blocking Americans exposed to Ebola from returning.

item.title: Socioeconomic factors become 'biologically embedded' in children's brains
item.description: A study of over 2,300 children aged 9-10 found that socioeconomic factors accounted for most differences in brain development.

item.title: Japan reactor restart renews concerns about nuclear waste storage
item.description: The restart highlights a critical issue for Japan's nuclear program: dwindling space for spent fuel and a lack of storage plans.
